input.headline: Huge to-do list': Woman covers her house in rhinestones

raw.headline: Huge to-do list': Woman covers her house in rhinestones

winner: She spent weeks bedazzling every surface in her home to stay motivated, only to realize that while she finally finished her to-do list, she now has to do it all again just to find the vacuum cleaner.

candidates.text: When her husband asked why she was covering every surface in the house with jewels, she sighed and said, "I'm just trying to make my to-do list sparkle more.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and specific, with a clever play on 'sparkle' relating to both rhinestones and making a to-do list more appealing."}

candidates.text: A woman covered her house in rhinestones, calling it her "huge to-do list." Critics say she's just *glittering* over her problems.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'to-do list' and 'glittering over problems' are clever and specific, with natural wordplay and surprise."}

candidates.text: She covered her house in rhinestones so she could finally tick off "decorate exterior" from her to-do list—just don't ask which one is the sparkly checkbox.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with the sparkly checkbox, concise and specific, natural humor"}

candidates.text: I covered my house in rhinestones so I could stop hearing people say "huge to-do list" every time they walked by!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "Puns on 'huge to-do list' with a creative twist, concise and surprising."}

candidates.text: She spent weeks bedazzling every surface in her home to stay motivated, only to realize that while she finally finished her to-do list, she now has to do it all again just to find the vacuum cleaner.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a specific, relatable scenario; concise and funny."}

candidates.text: I told my friend I was going to redecorate my house — now she thinks I'm a glitter addict.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related and has a mild humorous twist, but it lacks the specificity and surprise that would make it stand out in relation to the headline about rhinestones."}

candidates.text: I tried to make a to-do list, but my boss said it was too vague—so I covered my office in Post-Its and called it "Huge.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related and has a mild twist, but it lacks the specificity and surprise of the original headline, and the connection to rhinestones is missing."}

candidates.text: She tried to prioritize her tasks, but with all those rhinestones, her to-do list was shining too bright to read.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, specific, and uses a play on 'shining too bright to read' which connects the rhinestones with the to-do list in a surprising way."}

candidates.text: After covering her entire house in rhinestones, she realized that her to-do list was finally looking a bit flashy.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific, but the humor feels a bit forced and lacks natural flow. The connection between the to-do list and rhinestones isn't strongly made, reducing its overall funniness."}
